The billing practices on this carrier are standard and transparent. Charges are listed clearly, amounts match what I expect based on my plan, and payment processing works normally. Average billing experience consistent with industry norms without notable positives or negatives.

The internet speed throttling after daily limit is so aggressive that the connection becomes completely unusable. At 64 kbps even loading a basic text email takes forever. This punitive approach to post-limit speed is outdated when competitors offer at least 1 Mbps after limit which is enough for messaging and light browsing.

I am writing to acknowledge the outstanding support I received from the technical team regarding persistent 5G connectivity issues in my locality. After the initial complaint they sent a field engineer within 48 hours who identified a tower configuration error. The fix was deployed that same week and my speeds have been perfect since.

The network coverage inside my office building has improved significantly after they installed a small cell in our complex last month. I now get strong signal on every floor including the basement conference room. Call quality is consistently excellent which was previously my biggest frustration.

The complete package this carrier offers for the premium segment is genuinely compelling. Fast and reliable 5G internet, nationwide network coverage without dead zones in any city I visit, pristine call quality, fair billing, and an app that puts full account control in my pocket. Worth every rupee of the 999 monthly plan.

I am deeply dissatisfied with how this carrier handles the transition between recharge plan validities. There is a gap of several hours between expiry and new plan activation where I have zero service. No calls, no data, nothing. Customer support says this is normal system behavior but losing service for hours every month is not acceptable.

I want to highlight how the carrier's investment in infrastructure has transformed my daily connectivity experience over the past year. The 5G tower installed near my home delivers consistent speeds above 500 Mbps, call quality is impeccable, and the OTT streaming experience is buffer-free even at peak hours. Genuine improvement.
